description_long: This is a single open-toe sandal featuring a cork footbed and two wide, matte-finish synthetic straps in a muted taupe color. The sandal has a contoured insole with a slightly raised heel cup and arch support, designed for ergonomic comfort. The straps are secured with metal buckles, allowing for adjustable fit, and one strap crosses diagonally over the instep while the other runs horizontally near the toes. The outsole is made of textured, dark brown rubber with a wavy tread pattern for grip. The interior lining appears to be a soft, suede-like material, enhancing comfort for the wearer. The branding 'BIRKENSTOCK' is embossed on the outer side of the footbed near the heel.
description: A taupe, open-toe sandal with adjustable buckled straps, cork footbed, and textured rubber sole. Features ergonomic contours and visible Birkenstock branding.
description_view_0: Side view showing both adjustable straps, cork footbed, and embossed Birkenstock branding.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the heel cup, footbed contour, and strap arrangement.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the buckles, strap placement, and the full length of the sandal.
description_view_3: Front view showing the open toe area, strap crossing, and footbed curvature.
attribute_logo: Embossed 'BIRKENSTOCK' text on the outer side of the footbed near the heel, in the same color as the strap.
